mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM clinic_family_member WHERE deleted = 0
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR relation LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT id, patient_id, relation, name, gender, age, COALESCE(NULLIF(company, ''), '无') AS company, birthday, phone, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM clinic_family_member WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, patient_id, relation, name, gender, age, COALESCE(NULLIF(company, ''), '无') AS company, birthday, phone, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM clinic_family_member WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clinic_family_member (patient_id, relation, name, gender, age, company, birthday, phone, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{patientId}, #{relation}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{company}, #{birthday}, #{phone}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted})
mapper.update:
UPDATE clinic_family_member
patient_id = #{patientId}, relation = #{relation}, name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, age = #{age}, company = #{company}, birthday = #{birthday}, phone = #{phone}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, deleted = #{deleted},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
